title: Pleione stenochila
taxonomy: Pleione stenochila is classified as a species within the genus Pleione, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The genus Pleione is part of the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification further places the orchid family within the order Asparagales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The order Asparagales is part of the clade monocots, which are characterized by having one cotyledon in their seeds. The clade monocots is a major subgroup within the larger clade called angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants.
uses: Pleione stenochila is a species of orchid native to China. While there is limited information available on the specific medicinal uses of Pleione stenochila, some studies suggest that certain compounds found in orchids, including Pleione stenochila, may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
